name: Eric Zhou
title: Engineering Lead
summary: Hands-on engineering lead with 7 years delivering production-grade systems across insurance, energy, betting, and enterprise platforms. Combines strong technical depth (TypeScript, C#, Java, React, AWS, Azure) with direct people leadership, technical direction, and delivery ownership. Known for pragmatic, outcomes-focused leadership: identifying bottlenecks early, raising engineering standards, and improving team effectiveness across the full development lifecycle.

highlights: Led a team of 4 direct reports with structured 1:1s, goal setting, pair programming, and code reviews; defined team standards cutting PR rework by ~40% and halving new-joiner time-to-first-PR from 2 weeks to 1 week.
Owned delivery and system architecture for a major Australian insurance onboarding portal using micro-frontend architecture.
Built secure, scalable customer onboarding portals for a UK finance client using React, .NET, and Azure.

Led API modernisation for an Australian trading group, replacing legacy text-based integrations with OpenAPI-driven services; introduced AI-assisted workflows cutting repetitive implementation effort by ~80%.
Architected and delivered the Proof of Funds AI platform, integrating Google Document AI with React and Azure to fully automate document evaluation.
Pioneered AI practices across the production development lifecycle, embedding AI-assisted tooling into code generation, review, and testing workflows.
Co-owned engineering hiring pipeline, growing the team by 5 engineers within 12 months.
Led a timesheet pre-invoicing automation project end-to-end.
Built a high-throughput data validation service for Vector's energy platform, processing data from millions of meters daily.
Designed cloud-native solutions using Java, AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, API Gateway, Step Functions, S3, SQS.
Established CI/CD pipelines using AWS CodeBuild and Terraform.
Optimised Lambda performance, reducing cold start times by 30% and improving data processing speed by 20%.
Developed and maintained high-traffic sports betting systems using React, Node.js, Java.
Built new betting products and platform features, contributing to significant revenue uplift for TAB NZ.

education.degree: Bachelor of Building Technology and Engineering

projects.name: Runnly-ai — User Story to PR Automation Agents System
projects.description: Autonomous AI engineer integrated into the SDLC, capable of processing full user stories end-to-end.
highlights: Designed an autonomous AI engineer that explores codebases, plans implementations, writes changes, and opens PRs with minimal human intervention.
Solved advanced challenges in context-window management and LLM tool use for self-correcting code generation.

projects.name: Interlify — AI Developer SaaS Platform
projects.description: AI tooling SaaS platform helping developers integrate APIs with LLMs. Ranked #4 Product of the Day on Product Hunt.
projects.tech: Next.js, TypeScript, Python, OpenAI, Groq, PostgreSQL
highlights: Founder & Architect. Designed, built, and launched from scratch.
Ranked #4 Product of the Day on Product Hunt.
